subject: fix(modules): resolve 5 minor issues from third review pass
body:
- Side effect in state updater: recordUpload (localStorage write)
  was inside a setUploadState callback. React StrictMode calls
  updaters twice. Moved side effect outside the updater.
- Duplicate source note on retry: handleUploadModules created a
  [Source:] note on every call including retries. Added isRetry
  flag to skip note creation on retry calls.
- Hash not recorded after successful retry: handleRetryFailed
  never called recordUpload after all items succeeded. Added
  hash recording after retry completes.
- Stale comment: referenced old constant name BATCH_SIZE instead
  of UPLOAD_BATCH_SIZE.
- Misleading JSDoc: onRetryFailed prop described as "number of
  failed items" but is a callback.

Tags: bugfix, quality, modules, upload
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: contract-upload
Semver: patch
